title: Option 2 + Materialization: Multi-way Delta Expansion with CSE (TDD-First)
description: Implement corrected Option 2 design: K-atom join delta expansion with Common Subexpression Elimination (CSE) + Progressive Materialization. Avoid the 8.4x regression of original Option 2. Test-driven development approach. Validate on CSPA first, then DOOP. Parallel team execution with Codex for optimization analysis.

stories.title: Design Phase: Test-first specification for Option 2 + Materialization
stories.description: Design the corrected Option 2 approach with CSE + Progressive Materialization. Create detailed test specification BEFORE implementation. Define data structures, algorithms, and test cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Design document created: docs/performance/OPTION2-DESIGN.md with algorithm pseudocode and materialization strategy
Test specification: docs/performance/OPTION2-TESTS.md with 20+ specific test cases covering edge cases (empty delta, all-duplicate delta, 3-way joins, 8-way joins, etc.)
Data structure design: Extended wl_plan_op_t with delta_mode enum (AUTO, FORCE_DELTA, FORCE_FULL) documented
CSE materialization strategy documented: which joins to materialize, when, memory cost estimates
CSPA + DOOP rule analysis: Identify which rules have 3+, 4+, 8-way joins and which benefit from CSE
Linting check passed: markdown files valid

stories.title: Implement test infrastructure for Option 2 validation
stories.description: Create unit tests and integration tests for Option 2 before writing production code (TDD). Test harness for correctness verification (identical fact counts before/after).
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: tests/test_option2_cse.c with 20+ unit tests (empty delta, duplicates, CSE correctness, etc.)
Correctness oracle: Test compares output facts against baseline (must be identical, byte-for-byte within precision)
CSPA test harness: Integration test that runs CSPA with Option 2 enabled, validates output fact counts match baseline
DOOP test placeholder: Test skeleton for DOOP (will fill in when DOOP data ready)
All tests compile with -Wall -Wextra -Werror
Tests register in tests/meson.build
Baseline test run: tests/test_option2_cse passes (tests will fail initially until implementation)

stories.title: Implement core CSE materialization infrastructure
stories.description: Implement the materialized join storage and retrieval mechanism. Foundation for Option 2. Low-level data structures and memory management.
acceptanceCriteria: New struct: col_materialized_join_t with (data, nrows, ncols, memory_limit, cost_model)
Functions: col_materialized_join_create(), col_materialized_join_append(), col_materialized_join_lookup(), col_materialized_join_free()
Memory policy: Materialization only if join size < memory_limit (configurable, default 10MB)
Cost model: Track materialization cost vs recomputation cost for each join
Integration into session: Session tracks list of active materializations (create/reuse/evict)
All new functions tested in tests/test_option2_cse.c
Compilation succeeds with -Wall -Wextra -Werror
Linting: clang-format passes

stories.title: Implement delta_mode enum and plan op extensions
stories.description: Extend wl_plan_op_t with delta_mode field. Prepare evaluator to respect force-delta and force-full hints from plan compiler.
acceptanceCriteria: Enum added: wl_delta_mode_t with AUTO, FORCE_DELTA, FORCE_FULL values in wirelog/exec_plan.h
wl_plan_op_t extended: delta_mode field added and serialization updated
Backward compatibility: Default AUTO mode preserves current behavior
col_op_variable() updated to respect delta_mode (FORCE_DELTA, FORCE_FULL override heuristic)
col_op_join() updated to respect delta_mode for right-hand side
All tests in tests/test_option2_cse.c still pass
Compilation succeeds: -Wall -Wextra -Werror
Linting: clang-format passes, no warnings

stories.title: Implement plan rewriting for K-way delta expansion (CSE version)
stories.description: Extend plan compiler to emit K plan copies for K-atom rules, but WITH CSE materialization hints. This is the corrected Option 2 (not the naive copy approach).
acceptanceCriteria: Plan rewriter in wirelog/exec_plan_gen.c: For rules with K >= 3 body atoms in recursive strata, emit K annotated plan copies
Each copy marked with delta_mode: Copy 1 = FORCE_DELTA(atom 0), others = AUTO; Copy 2 = FORCE_DELTA(atom 1), others = AUTO; etc.
Materialization hints: Insert MATERIALIZED join ops where CSE saves cost (first K-2 atoms)
Progressive refinement: First 2 atoms materialized (once), last atom varies by delta position
CSPA rule rewriting: Verify 2 three-way rules get 3 plan copies each (6 total copies for 2 rules)
DOOP rule identification: Identify 8-way join rules that would benefit from progressive materialization
All tests in tests/test_option2_cse.c pass
Compilation succeeds with -Wall -Wextra -Werror
Linting: clang-format passes

stories.title: Integration: Evaluator respects materialization and delta_mode hints
stories.description: Wire up the evaluator (col_eval_stratum) to use materialized joins and respect delta_mode hints from plan ops.
acceptanceCriteria: col_eval_stratum updated to check plan ops for MATERIALIZED hint; if present, reuse cached join instead of recomputing
col_op_variable and col_op_join honor delta_mode flags from plan
Materialization lifecycle: Create on first eval, reuse for subsequent passes, evict after stratum completes
Memory tracking: Session tracks cumulative materialization memory; evict LRU if exceeds limit
All tests in tests/test_option2_cse.c pass
CSPA integration test: Compiles and runs without errors (may not be faster yet, just correct)

stories.title: CSPA validation: Correctness on baseline (CSPA benchmark)
stories.description: Validate Option 2 implementation on CSPA. Correctness gate: output fact counts must match baseline exactly. No performance regression allowed.
acceptanceCriteria: Benchmark run: ./build/bench/bench_flowlog --workload cspa completes without errors
Correctness: CSPA output fact count = baseline (20,381 tuples)
Iteration count: Document actual iteration count vs baseline
Wall time: Measure wall time; accept if >= baseline (no requirement for speedup at this stage, correctness is gate)
Memory: Monitor peak RSS; should be <= baseline (materialization reduces per-iteration allocations)
Linting check: clang-format passes, no warnings
Atomic commit: Commit integration work with clear message

stories.title: Performance optimization: CSE cost model tuning for CSPA
stories.description: After correctness validated, tune CSE materialization thresholds and cost model. Goal: iteration count reduction (H2 hypothesis confirmed) + acceptable per-iteration cost.
acceptanceCriteria: Cost model parameters tuned: memory_limit, materialization threshold optimized for CSPA (3-way joins)
CSPA iteration count: Measured and documented; reduction >20% from original incomplete semi-naive (H2 hypothesis)
CSPA wall time: Documented as baseline for Phase 2 (acceptable to be slower than original if memory improved)
Memory efficiency: Peak RSS reduction >= 30% from original CSPA (materialization reduces per-iteration snapshots)
Ablation study: Document cost of K plan copies vs CSE optimization savings
Linting: clang-format passes, no warnings
Atomic commit: Clear message on tuning changes

stories.title: DOOP preparation: Verify Option 2 compiles and runs DOOP workload
stories.description: Validate that Option 2 infrastructure handles DOOP's 8-way joins without regression. Correctness gate: DOOP must complete (not DNF).
acceptanceCriteria: DOOP data available: Verify bench/data/doop/ has CSV files
DOOP workload compiles: bench/workloads/doop.dl parses without error
Benchmark harness ready: ./build/bench/bench_flowlog --workload doop command recognized
Integration test: Run DOOP with Option 2 enabled; expect completion (currently DNF)
DOOP test added: tests/test_option2_doop.c created with DOOP-specific correctness checks
All tests compile and pass with -Wall -Wextra -Werror

stories.title: DOOP validation: Correctness on DOOP benchmark
stories.description: Run Option 2 on DOOP. Correctness gate: DOOP must complete and produce correct output. Performance gate: acceptable iteration count for 8-way joins (or document as future work).
acceptanceCriteria: Benchmark run: ./build/bench/bench_flowlog --workload doop completes (not DNF)
Wall time: Measured and documented (completion time for DOOP, baseline from original)
Iteration count: Documented; if reduced from original, confirm H2 hypothesis holds for 8-way joins
Memory: Peak RSS documented; should be reasonable (not 4+ GB amplification)
Correctness: Output fact count validated (if baseline available)
Linting: clang-format passes
Atomic commit: Clear message on DOOP validation

stories.title: Performance comparison: CSPA + DOOP benchmark report
stories.description: Generate final performance report comparing Option 2 (with CSE materialization) against original baseline. Document iteration reduction, memory efficiency, and per-iteration cost.
acceptanceCriteria: Report created: docs/performance/OPTION2-RESULTS.md with detailed metrics
CSPA metrics: wall time, iteration count, peak RSS vs baseline + H2 hypothesis confirmation
DOOP metrics: completion (DNF -> completed), wall time, iteration count, memory
CSE ROI analysis: Materialization cost vs savings (8-way join reduction from 8 copies to ~2 effective passes)
Comparison to original Option 2: Show that CSE fixes the 8.4x regression
Recommendations: When to apply CSE (3-way vs 4-way vs 8-way joins), memory limits, tuning params
Linting check passed

stories.title: Final verification: All tests pass, atomic commits maintained, linting clean
stories.description: Verify completion: All tests pass, all commits are atomic with strict linting, no regressions on other workloads (TC, Reach, CC, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: All tests pass: meson test -C build (tests/test_option2_cse.c, tests/test_option2_doop.c + all existing tests)
Benchmark suite: ./build/bench/bench_flowlog --workload all completes for 15 workloads (must not regress TC, Reach, CC, etc.)
Linting verification: git log shows all new commits pass clang-format, no lint warnings
Atomic commits verified: Each commit has single clear purpose (design, test harness, CSE infrastructure, delta_mode, plan rewriting, integration, CSPA validation, DOOP validation, results)
Documentation complete: docs/performance/OPTION2-DESIGN.md, OPTION2-TESTS.md, OPTION2-RESULTS.md all present and coherent
Clean state: No TODO/FIXME left from Option 2 work, progress.txt records all iterations
